name: BMW F30/F31 3 Series plug-in hybrid (2.0L 4-cyl petrol + electric)

serviceNotes.engine oil: 330e PHEV: CBS petrol engine oil MFR 30,000 km / 12 months EU (hybrid low engine use — time limit dominates; SIB B000214 / 330e service display).
serviceNotes.brake fluid: 24 months; regenerative braking changes pad wear but not fluid hygroscopy.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Petrol engine air filter each second oil service (60,000 km at 30,000 km oil ceiling) per garage.wiki F30 LCI.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 60,000 km: spark plugs with each second engine oil change (garage.wiki F30 LCI petrol row).
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Regen extends pad life; still inspect per CBS (~50,000 km planning).
serviceNotes.vehicle check: Includes hybrid-specific checks; use a workshop qualified for high-voltage systems.
serviceNotes.high-voltage battery coolant: BMW PHEV high-voltage battery/e-drive cooling circuit; 120,000 km MFR per BMW 330e PHEV maintenance data (HV supplement / workshop manual).
serviceNotes.coolant flush: Engine cooling circuit preventive ~120,000 km (separate from HV coolant in some vehicles).
serviceNotes.intake carbon clean: DI petrol engine may still need intake cleaning at high combustion mileage (~120,000 km).

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS intervals); BMW 330e PHEV owner's manual — 30,000 km / 12 months EU petrol engine oil service typical
serviceSources.micro filter: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2015/service-intervals.html — interior filter at every engine oil change
serviceSources.brake fluid: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2015/service-intervals.html — first change 3 years then every 2 years; BMW owner's manual 330e
serviceSources.air cleaner element: https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2015/service-intervals.html — air filter with each second engine oil change (60,000 km)
serviceSources.spark plugs: Changed from 90,000 km to 60,000 km per https://garage.wiki/bmw/3-series-sedan/sixth-generation-lci-f30/2015/service-intervals.html — second oil change
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 50,000 km planning interval (F30 LCI)
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 (CBS brake service); 60,000 km planning interval (F30 LCI)
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW SIB B000214 Attachment 2 — vehicle check every second engine oil service (60,000 km)
serviceSources.high-voltage battery coolant: BMW 330e PHEV service information / high-voltage supplement — battery coolant service interval 120,000 km (EU maintenance table)
